evals.expected_output: impl/core-logic branch merged into main. Branch deleted. Spec status updated to closed. Work item materials table updated. Devlog entry written.
assertions: Skill reads spec.md and confirms status is reviewed before merging
Skill does not merge if spec.md status is not reviewed

impl/{ticket-id} branch is deleted after merge
spec.md frontmatter status updated to closed

evals.prompt: Merge core-logic (when spec status is complete, not reviewed)
evals.expected_output: Skill stops and instructs user to run orchestra-review first.
